generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving AGREE syntax errors before attempting semantic fixes.
Prioritize fixing unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations when AGREE reports type errors.
Ensure AGREE type declarations use 'int', 'real', or 'bool' for scalar types.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
Ensure helper declarations match the expected expression types (bool for comparisons, int/real for arithmetic).
anti_patterns: Avoid adding new architecture to resolve AGREE errors; focus on fixing existing expressions.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model dependencies.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE contract placement in component types vs implementations
